titleStmt.title: SII 23.261: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 261. (A.R. No. 261 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Parāntaka I: year 19: 925-26 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of 30 kaḻañju of gold by Kundavaidēvi a relative (?) of queen Kokkiḷānaḍigaḷ, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mūlasthānattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ. The amount is stated to have been deposited with the Sabhā of Mādānamaṅgalam in Naṟaiyūrnāḍu. An uḻakku of oil was to be measured out every day in the temple by a person appointed by the Sabhā for the purpose and he was to get a portion of the offered rice (for his remuneration).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecari paṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 9Āvatu teṉkarait tiraimūrnāṭṭut tevatāṉam tiruviṭaimarutil śrīmulat tāṉattupperumāṉaṭikaḷukku
nampirāṭṭiyār kokkiḻāṉ Aṭikaḷ vāṭṭi kuntavaitevi vaiytta tirunontāviḷakkiṉukku Erikka vaiytta poṉ 3 10�m muppatiṉ kaḻañcu Ippoṉ koṇṭom naṟaiyūrnāṭṭu
tecam mātāṉamaṅkalattu cavaiyom Ippoṉ muppatiṉkaḻaiñcum koṇṭu Ippoṉṉiṉ poliyūṭṭiṉāl nicati Uḻakkeṇṇai catnrā tittaval śrīkoyilil tevakaṉmikaḷ
māṉom mātāṉamaṅkalattu cavaiyom Eṇṇai tarkku coṟu kuṭup pomāṉom Ivai vanmāheśva(va)rairakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
